title: Noida, Uttar Pradesh — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Noida, Uttar Pradesh: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Noida is a city in Uttar Pradesh with a population of 650,000. A planned satellite city of Delhi, a major IT and business hub with modern infrastructure, shopping malls, and residential complexes.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
